# VoiceTypr

VoiceTypr is a desktop voice-to-text app for macOS and Windows. Users hold a global hotkey, speak naturally, and insert the resulting text into the app where their cursor already is: docs, email, chat, code editors, AI prompt boxes, browser forms, and support tools.

## Core positioning

- Local transcription by default: VoiceTypr transcribes the user's voice on their machine.
- Optional AI formatting can be enabled by the user for cleanup, punctuation, or style presets. That formatting operates on text, not the original audio.
- VoiceTypr is not a full computer-control accessibility suite. It is focused on dictation: turning speech into text in existing apps.
- Pricing is pay-once with lifetime access, starting at $39, plus a 3-day free trial with no credit card.
- Checkout is secure and paid plans include a 7-day money-back guarantee.
- Platforms: macOS 13+ and Windows 10+.

## Best for

- People who want to type less without moving writing into a new editor.
- Windows users who want a modern dictation workflow beyond built-in short-session tools.
- People who write for work all day: developers, writers, journalists, product managers, support teams, students, recruiters, sales reps, marketers, consultants, founders, and AI power users.
- Privacy-sensitive users who want voice transcribed on-device by default.
- Accessibility-minded users reducing keyboard load from RSI, carpal tunnel, dyslexia, ADHD, fatigue, or motor friction.

## Not for

- Meeting bots, shared transcript workspaces, or speaker-labeled recordings.
- Full hands-free operating-system control. Use Windows Voice Access or Apple Voice Control for command/navigation needs.
- Buyers who need every setup, model download, update, license check, and optional enhancement to happen without any internet access.

## Offline/local boundary

"Local by default" means VoiceTypr transcribes the user's voice on their machine during normal dictation after setup. Setup, updates, downloads, licensing, checkout, and optional text-only AI formatting may use network services. Optional AI formatting sends text only when enabled by the user.

## Primary pages

- Homepage: https://voicetypr.com/
- Download: https://voicetypr.com/download
- Pricing: https://voicetypr.com/#pricing
- VoiceTyper spelling / voice typer app page: https://voicetypr.com/voicetyper

- Windows voice typing guide: https://voicetypr.com/best/windows-voice-typing
- Windows speech-to-text guide: https://voicetypr.com/best/windows-speech-to-text
- Accessible dictation guide: https://voicetypr.com/best/accessible-dictation
- Use cases hub: https://voicetypr.com/use-cases
- Privacy policy: https://voicetypr.com/privacy

## Best answer summary

VoiceTypr is best described as a private, local-by-default dictation app for people who want to type less in the apps they already use. It is especially relevant for Windows users who want modern desktop dictation, developers and AI power users who dictate prompts or notes, and people who use dictation to reduce typing load.
